name: Beginner Last Layer
description: The simplest last layer method for absolute beginners. 4 intuitive steps: orient edges, orient corners, permute corners, permute edges. Uses only basic algorithms.

algorithms.name: Orient Edges (Make Cross)
algorithms.notation: F R U R' U' F'

alternatives.notation: F U R U' R' F'

algorithms.name: Orient Corners (Sune)
algorithms.notation: R U R' U R U2 R'

alternatives.notation: R U2 R' U' R U' R'

algorithms.name: Permute Corners
algorithms.notation: U R U' L' U R' U' L

alternatives.notation: R U R' F' R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R'

algorithms.name: Permute Edges (3-Cycle)
algorithms.notation: R U' R U R U R U' R' U' R2

alternatives.notation: R2 U R U R' U' R' U' R' U R'
M2 U M U2 M' U M2
